metadata.description: Unofficial PDF operations marketplace — exposes the pdf-toolkit Claude Code plugin (18 PDF tools via iLoveAPI).

plugins.name: pdf-toolkit
plugins.description: 18 PDF operations (merge, split, compress, OCR, convert, watermark, protect, and more) exposed as MCP tools via iLoveAPI. Ships with a `pdf-workflow` skill describing 5 canonical multi-step recipes.
